message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title SDP Initiated Request/Response\nPattern with Correlation ID

skinparam backgroundColor #F3F0E6
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 40
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #2E8B57
  LifeLineBorderThickness 2
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  LifeLineStyle dashed
  MessageAlign left
  ActorBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #FFA500
  BoxBorderColor #808080
  BoxBackgroundColor #DDDDDD
  ActivationBorderColor #000000
  ActivationBackgroundColor #2E86DE
}

box "SDP" #DDDDDD
participant "SERVER\nNODE 1" as SN1
participant "SERVER\nNODE 2" as SN2
participant "STATE\nCACHE" as SC
participant "BROKER" as BR
end box

box "TBM/HU" #DDDDDD
participant "APP" as APP
end box

activate SN1
SN1 -> SN1 : new request/response\ninteraction
SN1 -> SN1 : create interaction\ncontext
SN1 -> SC : newMessageID =\nnextMessageID()
SN1 -> SC : put(newMessageID,\ninteraction context)
SN1 -> SN1 : create message
SN1 -> SN1 : message.messageID =\nnewMessageID
SN1 -> BR : publish message
deactivate SN1

BR -> APP : read message
activate APP
APP -> APP : create response
APP -> APP : response.correlationID =\nmessage.messageID
APP -> BR : publish response
deactivate APP

BR -> SN2 : read response
activate SN2
SN2 -> SC : interaction context =\nget(response.correlationID)
SN2 -> SN2 : process response
SN2 -> SC : delete(response.correlationID)
deactivate SN2

@enduml
```
